article.title: Need suggestion over target companies
article.content:
About me:
* Tier 3 CS grad, 2.5 YoE
* Current: D. E. Shaw India
* Comp: 47.5L (Base) + 5L (Retention bonus) + ~20L (Perf bonus, will get this next Jan)

I'm looking for a switch and aiming for the following companies. I need suggestions for any other companies that I can target for, and should I even switch given the market and AI takeover?

* Google L4
* Uber SDE 2
* Coinbase IC4
* Meta E4
* Optiver
* Booking SDE 2 - Amsterdam

I'm open to relocation within India and abroad to Singapore, UK or Europe. It'd also be helpful if someone can point out the expected salaries and work culture for these roles. As mentioned earlier, please add the same for any other roles or companies that you recommend.

TIA!

post.content:
Could consider the following companies as well:
Jane Street
Kronos Research
Graviton Research
QRT
Cube
Squarepoint
For a Tier 3 grad, you current compensation is fucking amazing bhai. Can we connect? I want to ask a few things. Thank you :)\nhttps://www.linkedin.com/in/suryanshu-tiwari/
